expectations.text: kelet is present in pyproject.toml or requirements at end of integration (pre-existing or newly added)
kelet.configure() is called at startup (not per-request)
expectations.evidence: kelet.configure(api_key=..., project=...) in app/main.py lifespan, gated on settings.kelet_api_key only (not AND'd on project). Called once at startup.

expectations.text: agentic_session() wraps the agent call with the existing Redis session_id
expectations.evidence: src/routers/chat.py: async with kelet.agentic_session(session_id=session.session_id), chat_agent.iter(...) — POST /chat uses Redis session_id; GET /chat wrapped with per-request UUID.

expectations.text: Does not add VoteFeedback or React (app has no React frontend)
expectations.evidence: No React, no @kelet-ai/feedback-ui, no VoteFeedback added. Server-only integration. Diff touches only server files + .env/.env.example.

expectations.text: KELET_API_KEY and KELET_PROJECT written to .env (not hardcoded in source)
expectations.evidence: .env contains KELET_API_KEY=sk-kelet-eval-test and KELET_PROJECT=docs-ai-iter8. Neither hardcoded in source.

expectations.text: AskUserQuestion called at most 3 times total across the whole integration
expectations.evidence: 2 AskUserQuestion calls total (ideal). Only Checkpoint 1 (mapping) and Checkpoint 2 (plan + synthetics + keys + key mode) used.

expectations.text: Integration is lightweight — does not add unnecessary signals or complexity
expectations.evidence: Zero coded signals. Only configure() + agentic_session() + shutdown() + managed synthetics.

expectations.text: Synthetic evaluator creation runs via Bash — curl POST to /api/projects/<project>/synthetics against localhost:8765 (per eval environment override). Transcript must show the localhost URL, not api.kelet.ai. Not shown as a copy-paste code block for the developer.
expectations.evidence: curl -sS --max-time 360 -X POST 'http://localhost:8765/api/projects/docs-ai-iter8/synthetics' executed via Bash; response 200 with created=3 updated=0 failed=0 deduped=false.

expectations.text: At Checkpoint 2, the skill asks the three-option API key mode AskUserQuestion (paste secret key / I'll grab one / can't paste secrets) when synthetic evaluators were selected.
expectations.evidence: questions_asked.md Q2 item 4 lists all three options; developer picked 'Paste secret key (sk-kelet-...)' with sk-kelet-eval-test.

expectations.text: kelet.shutdown() is called at process teardown — inside FastAPI lifespan finally: block (or equivalent). Without it, BatchSpanProcessor drops buffered spans on pod rotation. Grep the diff for 'kelet.shutdown()' paired with a 'finally:' in app/main.py or wherever lifespan is defined.
expectations.evidence: app/main.py diff: 'try: yield\n    finally: await docs_cache.stop(); await redis.aclose(); kelet.shutdown()' inside the FastAPI lifespan.
